map.name: The Funky Queen
map.objective: Be the best funky player, and become the Queen of Funky!

contributor.contribution: Allowing me to break the mapdev server

constants.constant: `a[Announcer]:`r
Move on `2`lGreen Light!`r and stop on `c`lRed Light`r. `b`oReach the finish line to earn points.
Survive as long as possible. Dying eliminates you. `b`oLonger survival gives more points.
Eliminate players using cacti. `b`oYour final position determines your points.
Avoid being tagged with TNT. `b`oSurvive each round to earn points.
Choose the right tool and dig down fast. `b`oReach the finish line to score.
Run the course as fast as you can. `b`oFinish earlier to earn more points.
Capture and hold tiles. `b`oEarn points over time for each tile you control.
Eliminate players. `b`oEach kill gives you points.
Land in the water. `b`oEach successful landing gives you points.
Find the correct path. `b`oYour final position determines your points.
Use your bow to break the TNT floor and eliminate players. `b`oYour final position determines your points.
Cross the glass bridge. `b`oEarn points by guessing platforms and for finishing.
Find and eliminate players. `b`oYour final position determines your points.
Stay on top of the ladder. `b`oEarn points over time while holding the position.
Knock players off the arena. Taking damage increases knockback. `b`oEarn points for each elimination, but lose one point each time you die.
Avoid being infected or infect humans. `b`oEarn points by killing players and surviving as a human.
`lWinner chooses!
If you win, you select the next game
`lYou choose the next game!
Right click a dye to select the next game
Nice choice {p}!
Welp... it seems that {p} went for a nap.
I'll select the game myself.

item.name: `f`lRight click to select kit: `ePyro
item.lore: Light players on fire via bow or melee!

item.name: `f`lRight click to select kit: `eSpawner
item.lore: Spawn Slimes, Zombies, Creepers and Skeletons!

respawn.message: You will respawn as soon as possible
You will respawn when `lBow Spleef`r is over
You will respawn when `lCacti Rage`r is over
You will respawn when `lDig Down`r is over
You will respawn when `lMini Dropper`r is over
You will respawn when `lGlass Bridge`r is over
You will respawn when `lGhost Squadron`r is over
You will respawn when `lInfection`r is over
You will respawn when `lLadderp`r is over
You will respawn when `lMobArena`r is over
You will respawn when `lRace`r is over
You will respawn when `lRage`r is over
You will respawn when `lRed Light, Green Light`r is over
You will respawn when `lSumo`r is over
You will respawn when `lTip Toe`r is over
You will respawn when `lTNT Tag`r is over
You will respawn when `lWool Story Bro`r is over

message.text: ${ANNOUNCER_PREFIX} A new round has been added!
`cEnable debug mode ('debug_mode = 1' or 'debugger = 1') to use this tool
`c⚠ All Zombies have already been assigned!

message.title: `b`lRandom selection!
message.subtitle: The {0} game is being chosen at random.

message.text: ${ANNOUNCER_PREFIX} Stand on one of the slices to vote for the next game.
${ANNOUNCER_PREFIX} If {p} doesn't decide in 15 seconds, a random game will be chosen.
${ANNOUNCER_PREFIX} There seems to be no winner... Let's select a random game instead.

after.message: Someone has finished. Ending the game in {0}
Someone has finished. Ending the game in {0}
All players will be visible in {0}
Someone has finished. Ending the game in {0}
Someone has finished. Ending the game in {0}
Someone has finished. Ending the game in {0}

case.result: ${ANNOUNCER_PREFIX} Welcome to `l"The Funky Queen"`r, `aBattle for the Crown!
${ANNOUNCER_PREFIX} In this tournament, you'll compete in a free-for-all across `a${RND_AMOUNT} rounds.
${ANNOUNCER_PREFIX} Each round features a different arcade minigame, `ochosen randomly, by vote, or by the last winner.
${ANNOUNCER_PREFIX} Points are awarded based on how you perform in each round.
${ANNOUNCER_PREFIX} But `oeach game is worth more than the last`r, so fight until the final one!

message.text: ${ANNOUNCER_PREFIX} Huh? No votes registered. Selecting random game
